name: Cherries a La Belle
recipeIngredient: 18 and one-half ounce lemon cake mix (not pudding mix!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cans of pineapple and tart baking cherries into a 9" x 13" greased baking pan.
2. Sprinkle the cake mix over the top of the fruit. Do not mix.
3. Drizzle melted butter over the cake mix, then sprinkle nuts and lemon rind on top.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 50 minutes. Serve hot with heavy cream.
